description: WCAU, channel 10, is an owned-and-operated television station of the NBC Television Network, located in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, USA. WCAU is owned by the NBC Owned Television Stations group, and operates as part of a television duopoly with Atlantic City, New Jersey-licensed WWSI (channel 62), an affiliate of the Spanish-language Telemundo network; both networks are owned by NBCUniversal, a subsidiary of the Philadelphia-based media firm Comcast. WCAU maintains studios in Bala Cynwyd on City Avenue at the border between Philadelphia and Bala Cynwyd, and its transmitter is based in the Roxborough section of Philadelphia.
